user.title: Set up Aurora
user.description: Aurora is your smart alarm clock. Bind devices (speakers, lights, notifications…) afterwards in the options — nothing is required to start.

data_description.owner: Optional name of the person this installation primarily belongs to.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Aurora is already configured. Only one installation is supported — add alarms inside it.

init.title: Role bindings
init.description: Bind abstract roles to your devices. Every field is optional — leave a role empty and Aurora simply skips that feature. The exact alarm time is always kept.

data_description.audio_sink: A media player used to play the ringtone.
data_description.wake_light: A dimmable light, WLED, or a screen-brightness number for the sunrise.
data_description.display_surface: A tablet/screen that can show the ring view.
data_description.notify_channel: Where ring notifications are sent (phone, watch, overlay…).
data_description.sleep_signal: Sensors that hint whether you are asleep, for early wake-up.
data_description.presence_signal: Sensors that hint whether you are present/awake.
data_description.ring_max_duration: Safety auto-stop if a ring is never dismissed.

user.title: Add alarm
user.description: Create a new alarm. Edit or remove it later from the Aurora card.

data_description.weekdays: Only used when Repeat is set to Weekly.

abort.alarm_created: Alarm created. Manage it from the Aurora card.

update_alarm.name: Update alarm
update_alarm.description: Update fields of an existing alarm.

id.name: Alarm ID
id.description: The id of the alarm to update.

id.name: Alarm ID
id.description: The id of the alarm to remove.

skip_next.name: Skip next
skip_next.description: Skip the next occurrence of an alarm.

id.name: Alarm ID
id.description: The id of the alarm to skip.

id.name: Alarm ID
id.description: Optional: which alarm to ring (defaults to the next/first).

benchmark_vision.name: Benchmark vision
benchmark_vision.description: Measure AI-vision latency on your hardware (available from Phase 3).
